functional_requirements.description: Customer can search and browse products by category
Customer can add items to a shopping cart
Customer can checkout and make payment
Customer can track order shipment status
Seller can list and manage products
Seller can view sales analytics and reports
System manages inventory and stock levels
Admin can manage users sellers and disputes
Customer can write product reviews and ratings
System sends email notifications for orders and promotions

non_functional_requirements.target: handle 100000 concurrent users during flash sales
modular architecture supporting independent service deployment
